clusters.summary: In a significant move, the Federal Council has approved a bill requiring online shops to display a clearly visible revocation button on their website or app within a 14-day withdrawal period. This law aims to improve consumer policy and prevent "dark patterns" that manipulate consumers into making unwanted choices. The bill also provides patients with free access to their complete treatment file, as described by Federal Justice Minister Stefanie Hubig as "real consumer policy progress". Meanwhile, German teams Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen will face each other in the playoffs of the Champions League, while Atalanta Bergamo from Italy will meet Olympiakos Piraeus from Greece in an intermediate round. In a separate health development, Germany has seen a rise in respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) cases, particularly among infants and children under 4 years old, although serious illnesses are rare due to passive vaccination recommendations. The Standing Vaccination Commission recommends RSV vaccination for newborns and older adults with underlying diseases. Elsewhere, bus drivers in Schleswig-Holstein's county-free cities are going on a warning strike over better working conditions, while Volkswagen has reopened its iconic glass factory in Dresden as an experience location and event space, marking a shift from industrial production to showcasing
